purpose: Turn one human goal into a repo-safe AIOS development mission with worker tasks, validation, merge order, dashboard status, and next safe action.
safety_rules: APPLY writes mission files only under automation/mission_control/missions/.
default_validation_checklist: PowerShell parser check for changed scripts.
JSON parse check for mission_plan.json and template JSON.
APPLY mission generation to a safe mission folder.
default_blockers: Human approval required before APPLY work.
No merge until validation proof is attached.
No live trading, broker, secrets, startup, scheduled task, or destructive action.
